name: Lead With Purpose
tagline: Align who you are with how you lead — clarify your purpose, vision, and legacy as a leader.
coachInstructions: This is the business-leader track. Use professional, growth-oriented language. Connect identity and values to leadership presence, decision-making, team culture, and long-term legacy. Draw on the VisionOne High Performance leadership frameworks. Avoid religious language unless the coachee introduces it.
